case_title: DONAGHY, PATRIC VS SOUTHWIND PUBLISHING/MICHAEL KREITER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,209.85 FILED BY DONAGHY, PATRIC AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWIND PUBLISHING/MICHAEL KREITER SOUTHWIND PUBLISHING WESTERN SALES OFFICE:PAUL TUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONAGHY, PATRIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHWIND PUBLISHING WESTERN SALES OFFICE:PAUL TUR $2,209.85 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,229.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO PAUL TORCHETTA RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-16-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
